items.what_it_does: Matches values that are exactly equal to a specified value.
Matches all values that are not equal to a specified value.
Matches values that are strictly greater than a specified value.
Matches values that are greater than or equal to a specified value.
Matches values that are strictly less than a specified value.
Matches values that are less than or equal to a specified value.
Matches any of the values specified in an array.
Matches none of the values specified in an array.
Returns documents that satisfy at least one of the specified conditions.
Returns documents that satisfy all the specified conditions.
Inverts the effect of a query filter and returns documents that do not match.
Returns documents that fail all the specified conditions.
Filters the documents to pass only matching documents to the next stage.
Performs a left outer join to another collection to pull in related data.
Selects, adds, or renames fields in the output documents.
Groups documents by an ID and applies calculations (sum, avg, etc.).
Breaks an array field into individual documents for each element.
Orders documents (1 for ascending, -1 for descending).
Restricts the number of documents passed to the next stage.
Returns a document containing the count of the filtered results.
Converts a date string into a searchable Date object.
Returns the number of elements in an array.
Provides a replacement value if a field is null or missing.
Checks if a specific field exists in the document.
